layout.navigation: Fixed left sidebar (w-64 desktop, collapsable to w-16), sticky top header with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#05050A]/70)
layout.stream_view: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-0 lg:gap-4. Video wrapper: col-span-1 lg:col-span-9. Chat wrapper: col-span-1 lg:col-span-3 h-[60vh] lg:h-[calc(100vh-80px)].

components.cards: bg-[#0F0F16] border border-white/5 rounded-xl overflow-hidden hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-[#00E5FF] text-black font-bold rounded-md px-6 py-2 hover:bg-[#00B3CC] transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-[#292938] text-white font-medium rounded-md px-6 py-2 hover:bg-[#3D3D52] transition-colors

components.chat: bg-[#0F0F16] border-l border-white/5 flex flex-col. Messages should have high-contrast username colors. Input area solid dark.
components.avatars: rounded-full object-cover ring-2 ring-transparent. If live: ring-[#00E5FF] ring-offset-2 ring-offset-[#05050A]

categories.description: IRL / Just Chatting / Neon City cover

hero_background.description: Hero section background for landing page or discover section

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Electric & Neon archetype modified for Dark/Blue theme. Use #05050A for backgrounds, not generic Tailwind gray.
Use 'Outfit' for all headings and 'Manrope' for body text. Add the Google Fonts link to your HTML file.
Ensure the stream player takes up maximum space (Control Room grid), and the chat is a distinct, readable column on the right.
Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for sharp, tech-oriented iconography.
Never use pure white (#FFFFFF) for body text; use the secondary text color (#A0A0AB) to reduce eye strain, reserving pure white for headings.
All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='chat-submit-button').
Do not build HTML datepickers/dropdowns; use shadcn components.
CRITICAL: The frontend is standard React (.js/.jsx files), not TypeScript (.tsx). Generate standard Javascript files only.
Build the core live streaming UI structure: Sidebar, Header, Stream Player Main Area, and live Chat Column.
